system.powerDescription:
With a puff of smoke, you instantly swap the positions of creatures and objects within range. You may only swaps creatures with creatures and objects with objects. The objects may, individually, have a maximum size of CAT. You may peform 1/2 CAT swaps as part of this power's use. If you attempt to swap an unwilling creature, roll PSYCHE, only spending a burst on success. If you fail, no swaps occur. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power.
